* NE555 Blinker Circuit Schematic
* Generated by Jules
* Corrected for 50% Duty Cycle

* --- Components ---
* Power Supply
V1 VCC GND 9V

* NE555 Timer IC (as a subcircuit instance)
* Connections: 1:GND, 2:TRIG, 3:OUT, 4:RESET, 5:CTRL, 6:THRES, 7:DIS, 8:VCC
XU1 GND TRIG OUT RESET CTRL THRES DIS VCC NE555

* Timing Resistors and Diode for 50% Duty Cycle
* Diode D1 is placed in parallel with R2 to achieve a ~50% duty cycle.
R1 VCC DIS 68k
R2 DIS THRES 68k
D1 THRES DIS 1N4148

* Timing Capacitor
C1 THRES GND 10uF

* Control Pin Bypass Capacitor
C2 CTRL GND 10nF

* LED Output Stage (Alternating)
R3 VCC LED1_A 1k
D2 LED1_A OUT LED_Green
R4 OUT LED2_A 1k
D3 LED2_A GND LED_Red

* --- Net Connections ---
* The TRIG and THRES pins are connected together.
.connect TRIG THRES

* The RESET pin is tied to VCC to be inactive.
.connect RESET VCC

* --- Models (placeholders for import) ---
.MODEL 1N4148 D()
.MODEL LED_Green D()
.MODEL LED_Red D()
.SUBCKT NE555 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8
.ENDS NE555

.END
